image:image.image:title: Flytora – Free Online Typing Game
image:image.image:caption: Play the free online typing game Flytora. Type words to fly a bird through obstacles and improve your WPM.

image:image.image:caption: Flytora classic mode gameplay screenshot showing the bird, pipe obstacles and word typing interface.
